english translation text: Ziyarat Waritha

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah,
the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ آدَمَ صَفْوَةِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O heir of Adam, the chosen one of Allah

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ نُوحٍ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O heir of Nuh, the prophet of Allah

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O heir of Ibrahim, the dear friend of Allah

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوسَىٰ كَلِيمِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O heir of Musa, the one addressed by Allah

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عِيسَىٰ رُوحِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O heir of Isa, the spirit of Allah

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدٍ حَبِيبِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O the heir of Muhammad, the beloved of Allah

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ اَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O heir of Ameerul Mu’mineen, the friend of Allah

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلْمُصْطَفَىٰ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O son of Muhammad, al Mustafa

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ عَلِيٍّ ٱلْمُرْتَضَىٰ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O son of Ali, al-Murtadha

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O son of Fatima, az-Zahra

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ خَدِيـجَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O son of Khadijah, al-Kubra

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you O fearless warrior of Allah, son of a fearless warrior of Allah,

arabic text: وَٱلْوِتْرَ ٱلْمَوْتُورَ
english translation text: And one who was killed, but to whom blood revenge is still denied.

arabic text: اشْهَدُ انَّكَ قَدْ اقَمْتَ ٱلصَّلاَةَ وَآتَيْتَ ٱلزَّكَاةَ
english translation text: I bear witness that you established the prayer, and gave zakat, enjoined towards good, and forbade evil

arabic text: وَاَمَرْتَ بِٱلْمَعْرُوفِ وَنَهَيْتَ عَنِ ٱلْمُنْكَرِ
english translation text: And enjoined towards good, and forbade evil

arabic text: وَاطَعْتَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ حَتَّىٰ اتَاكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
english translation text: You obeyed Allah and His Messenger until certitude came to you (i.e. death overtook you)

arabic text: فَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ اُمَّةً قَتَلَتْكَ وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ اُمَّةً ظَلَمَتْكَ
english translation text: May Allah curse the people who killed you and the people who oppressed you

arabic text: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ اُمَّةً سَمِعَتْ بِذٰلِكَ فَرَضِيَتْ بِهِ
english translation text: and may Allah curse the people who heard about it and were pleased with it.

arabic text: يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا اَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text:
O my Master,
O Aba- Abdillah

arabic text: اَشْهَدُ اَنَّكَ كُنْتَ نُوراً فِي ٱلاَصْلاَبِ ٱلشَّامِخَةِ وَٱلاَرْحَامِ ٱلْمُطَهَّرَةِ
english translation text: I bear witness that you were a light in lofty loins and pure wombs.

arabic text: لَمْ تُنَجِّسْكَ ٱلْجَاهِلِيَّةُ بِاَنْجَاسِهَا، وَلَمْ تُلْبِسْكَ مِنْ مُدْلَهِمَّاتِ ثِيَابِهَا
english translation text: Paganism did not taint you with its impurity nor did the darkness cover you with its cloak,

arabic text: وَاَشْهَدُ اَنَّكَ مِنْ دَعَائِمِ ٱلدِّينِ، وَاَرْكَانِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text: I bear witness that you are from the pillars of religion and the leaders of the believers

arabic text: وَاَشْهَدُ اَنَّكَ ٱلإِمَامُ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلتَّقِيُّ، ٱلرَّضِيُّ ٱلزَّكِيُّ، ٱلْهَادِي ٱلْمَهْدِيُّ
english translation text: and I bear witness that you are the Imam (who is) the good, the pious, well pleased (with Allah), pure, the guide, and the rightly guided.

arabic text: وَاَشْهَدُ اَنَّ ٱلاَئِمَّةَ مِنْ وُلْدِكَ كَلِمَةُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ
english translation text: And I bear witness that the Imams from your progeny are the maxims of piety,

arabic text: وَاَعْلاَمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰ وَٱلْعُروَةُ ٱلْوُثْقَىٰ وَٱلْحُجَّةُ عَلَىٰ اَهْلِ ٱلدُّنْيَا
english translation text: the signs of guidance, the strong rope and the proofs of Allah over the people of the world.

arabic text: وَاَشْهِدُ ٱللَّهَ وَمَلاَئِكَتَهُ وَاَنْبِيَاءَهُ وَرُسُلَهُ اَنِّي بِكُمْ مُؤْمِنٌ وَبِإِيَابِكُمْ
english translation text: I call to witness, Allah, His angels, His Prophets and His Messengers, (saying) that I believe in you,

arabic text: مُوقِنٌ بِشَرَائِعِ دِينِي وَخَوَاتِيمِ عَمَلي
english translation text: and am certain about your return, and about the laws of my religion, and the results of my deeds.

arabic text: وَقَلْبِي لِقَلْبِكُمْ سِلْمٌ وَاَمْرِي لاَمْرِكُمْ مُتَّبِعٌ
english translation text: My heart is obedient to your heart, and my affair is in line with your affair,

arabic text: صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَعَلَىٰ اَرْوَاحِكُمْ
english translation text: May the blessings of Allah be on you, and on your souls,

arabic text: وَعَلَىٰ اَجْسَادِكُمْ وَعَلَىٰ اَجْسَامِكُمْ وَعَلَىٰ شَاهِدِكُمْ وَعَلَىٰ غَائِبِكُمْ
english translation text: your corpses, on your bodies, on those present among you, on those absent among you,

arabic text: وَعَلَىٰ ظَاهِرِكُمْ وَعَلَىٰ بَاطِنِكُمْ
english translation text: what is apparent of you, and what is hidden of you.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَابْنَ رِسُوْلِ اللهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O son of the Messenger of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَابْنَ نَبِيِّ اللهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O son of the Prophet of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَابْنَ اَمِيْرِ الْمُؤمِنِيْنَ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O son of Ameerul Mu’mineen

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَابْنَ الْحُسَيْنِ الشَّهِيْدِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O son of Husayn, the martyr

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الشَّهِيْدُ وَابْنُ الشَّهِيْدِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O martyr, and the son of a martyr

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الْمَظْلُوْمُ وَبْنُ الْمَظْلُوْمِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O the oppressed and son of the oppressed.

arabic text: لَعَنَ اللهُ اُمَّةً قَتَلَتْكَ وَلَعَنَ اللهُ اُمَّةً ظَلَمَتْكَ
english translation text: May Allah curse the people who killed you, and may Allah curse the people who oppressed you.

arabic text: وَلَعَنَ اللهُ اُمَّةً سَمِعَتْ بِذَالِكَ فَرَضِيَتْ بِهِ
english translation text: And may Allah curse the people who listened to that and were pleased with it.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَااَوْلِيَآءَ اللهِ وَاَحِبَّآئَهُ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O friends of Allah, and those beloved to Him.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَااَصْفِيَآءَ اللهِ وَاَوِدّآئَهُ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O the chosen ones of Allah, and those affectionate to Him.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَااَنْصَارَ دِيْنِ اللهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O helpers of the religion of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَااَنْصَارَ رَسُوْلِ اللهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O helpers of the Messenger of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَااَنْصَارَ اَمِيْرِ الْمُؤْمِنِيْن
english translation text: Peace be on you, O helpers of Ameerul Mu’mineen.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَااَنْصَارَ فَاطِمَةَ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَآءِ الْعَالَمِيْنَ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O helpers of Fatima, chief of the women of Paradise.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَااَنْصَارَ اَبِيْمُحَمَّدٍ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْوَلِيِّ الزَّكِيِّ النَّاصِحِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O helpers of Abi Muhammad, Al-Hasan bin Ali, the friend, the pure, the well-wisher.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَااَنْصَارَ اَبِيْعَبْدِ اللهِ بِاَبِيْ اَنْتُمْ وَاُمِّي
english translation text: Peace be on you, O helpers of Abi Abdillah, May my father and my mother be sacrificed for you.

arabic text: طِبْتُمْ وَطَابَتِ اْلأَرْضُ الَّتِي فِيْهَا دُفِنْتُمْ
english translation text: You are purified, and so is the earth on which you are buried.

arabic text: وَفُزْتُمْ فَوْزًا عَظِيْمًا
english translation text: And you were victorious, with a mighty victory.

arabic text: فَيَالَيْتَنِيْ كُنْتُ مَعَكمْ فَاَفُوْزَ مَعَكُمْ
english translation text: If only I had been with you, I would have succeeded with you.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَااَبَا الْفَضْلِ الْعَبَّاسَ ابْنِ اَمِيْرِالَمُؤْمِنِيْنَ
english translation text: Peace be on you O Abul Fadhl, al-Abbas, son of Ameerul Mu’mineen.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَابْنَ سَيِّدِ الوَصِيِّيْنَ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O son of the chief of the successors.

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَابْنَ اَوَّلِ الْقَوْمِ اِسْلاَمًا
english translation text: Peace be on you, O son of (the one who was) the first to accept Islam, in the community.

arabic text: وَاَقْدَمِهِمْ اِيْمَانًا وَاَقْوَمِيْهِمْ بِدِيْنِ اللهِ
english translation text: The foremost in faith, the most firm on the religion of Allah,

arabic text: وَاَحْوَطِهِمْ عَلَى اْلأِسْلاَمَ
english translation text: And the most dedicated to guard over Islam.

arabic text: اَشْهَدُ لَقَدْ نَصَحْتُ لِلَّهِ وَلِرَسُوْلِهِ
english translation text: I bear witness that you advised in the way of Allah, and His Messenger.

arabic text: وَلِأَخِيْكَ فَنِعْمَ اَلأَخُ الَمُوَاسِي
english translation text: And your brother, How great a consoler you were as a brother!

arabic text: فَلَعَنَ اللهُ اُمَّةً قَتَلَتْكَ وَلَعَنَ اللهُ اُمَّةً ظَلَمَتْكَ
english translation text: May Allah curse the people who killed you, May Allah curse the people who oppressed you.

arabic text: وَلَعَنَ اللهُ اُمَّة ًاسْتَحَلَّتْ مِنْكَ الْمَاحَارِمَ وَانْتَهَكَتْ حُرْمَةَ اْلأِسْلاَم
english translation text: And may Allah curse the people who regard lawful from you what was forbidden and violated the sanctity of Islam.

arabic text: فَنِعْمَ الصَّابِرُ الْمُجَاهِدُ الْمُحَا مِي النَّاصِرُ
english translation text: How wonderful is the patient one, the fighter, the protector, the helper,

arabic text: وَاْلأَخُ الدَّافِعُ عَنْ اَخِيْهِ
english translation text: And the brother who defends his brother,

arabic text: اَلْمُجِيْبُ اِلى طَاعَةِ رَبِّهِ
english translation text: Who responds to the obedience of His Lord,

arabic text: اَلرَّاغِبُ فِيْمَا زَهِدَ فِيْهِ غَيْرُهُ
english translation text: Who hopes for that which others have renounced,

arabic text: مِنَ الثّوَابِ الْجَزِيْلِ وَالثَّنَاءِ اْلجَمِيْلِ
english translation text: Of abundant reward, and beautiful praise.

arabic text: وَاْلحَقَكَ اللهُ بِدَرَجَةِ آبَائِكَ فِي جَنَّاتِ النَّعِيْمِ
english translation text: May Allah join you with the ranks of your fathers in the heaven.
